title: 中2 2学期期末 英語テスト対策
subtitle: 比較級・最上級・道案内・長文読解

choice.label: 4 CHOICES
choice.description: 4択問題 — 正しい答えを選ぼう

questions.jp: I did (　　) in English than I thought.
Mr. Miyatake talks to the students (　　) a smile.
He can run the fastest (　　) this city.
You drank (　　) soda than I did.
She felt (　　) for him, because he looked very hungry.
This movie is the oldest (　　) the three.
Kyoto is the (　　) place in Japan.
The Vatican City is (　　) Tokyo Disneyland.
Today is (　　) than yesterday.
Be strong, young man, (　　) you'll have a great future.
I'm a little (　　) to drink this milk.
When the boy was (　　) to leave, the woman said, 'Wait.'
Please give us your (　　) on this book.

次の2文の内、表の内容と合っているものはどれか。
① Thailand is the largest country of the four.
② Thailand is not as small as the Philippines.
（表: Thailand=513,120km², Philippines=300,000km², Indonesia=1,904,569km², Malaysia=330,000km²）

reading.label: 読解チャレンジ
reading.description: 長文読解 — 本文の内容から正しい答えを選ぼう

questions.jp:
Why can't kangaroos live in the city?
（カンガルーはなぜ都市で生きられないか）
questions.hint: 本文より: Kangaroos need open grassland and they can't live in cities.
choices: Because they can't find food and water.
Because they don't need much water.
Because they prefer a cold climate.
questions.answer: Because they can't find food and water.

questions.jp:
How does a kangaroo carry its baby?
（カンガルーはどのように赤ちゃんを運ぶか）
questions.hint: 本文より: The kangaroo carries its baby in a pouch（袋）on its stomach.
choices: In a pouch on its stomach.
questions.answer: In a pouch on its stomach.

questions.jp:
How do kangaroos communicate with each other?
（カンガルーはどのように仲間とコミュニケーションをとるか）
questions.hint: 本文より: They tap the ground with their feet.
choices: They tap the ground with their feet.
They make a loud sound with their mouth.
questions.answer: They tap the ground with their feet.

questions.jp:
What is true about kangaroos jumping?
（カンガルーのジャンプに関して正しいのはどれか）
questions.hint: 本文より: They never get tired when they jump far and they can jump over one hundred meters.
choices: They never get tired when they jump far.
They can jump over one thousand meters.
They always fall when they land.
They jump more slowly than other animals.
questions.answer: They never get tired when they jump far.

questions.jp:
Which statement best describes kangaroos according to the passage?
（本文の内容に最も合っているのはどれか）
questions.hint: 本文の結論部分: Kangaroos are one of the most amazing mammals in the world.
choices: Kangaroos are one of the most amazing mammals in the world.
Kangaroos are the fastest animals in Australia.
questions.answer: Kangaroos are one of the most amazing mammals in the world.

rearrange.label: REARRANGE
rearrange.description: 並び替え問題 — 単語を正しい順序に並べよう

questions.jp: 私は彼女ほど上手にピアノを弾けません。
questions.answer: I can't play the piano as well as her.

questions.jp: このクラスでEijiと同じくらい背が高い生徒はいません。（Eijiが一番背が高い）
questions.answer: No other student is as tall as Eiji in this class.

questions.jp: 私の姉は私より3つ年上です。
questions.answer: My sister is three years older than me.

questions.jp: あなたは全員の中で最も一生懸命練習しました。
questions.answer: You practiced the hardest of all.

questions.jp: 文字が小さすぎて私には読めません。
questions.answer: The letters are too small for me to read.

questions.jp: 日本語訳: 彼女はバスケットボールをするときEijiと同じくらい上手です。
questions.answer: She is as good as Eiji when she plays basketball.

word.label: VOCABULARY
word.description: 単語テスト — 英単語を直接入力しよう

questions.jp: 笑顔（with a ___）
フィードバック・意見（～ on this book）
袋（カンガルーが赤ちゃんを入れる体の袋）
妊娠している（形容詞）
政府・行政（kangaroo protection の主語になる語）
草地（open ___, カンガルーが暮らす場所）
哺乳類
比較する（to ___ A with B）
届ける・配達する（名詞形: delivery）
驚くべき（___ animal）
